spec_match.rationale: Superb demonstration of MutationObserver mechanics. Accurately observes target/data attributes of Node.PROCESSING_INSTRUCTION_NODE type additions/removals.

interactive.rationale: Exposes robust interface features: live counter badges, dynamic log textboxes, collapsible recursive tree grids, and inline 'remove' hooks.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the parent mutation observer description perfectly.

edge_cases.rationale: Fails to implement any HTML escaping. Appends target and data directly to innerHTML strings on line 244 (in renderNodeChildren) and line 271 (in renderPiList), which enables DOM injection bugs if the user provides malformed inputs. This directly violates the repository rules.

references.rationale: Properly cites the official ChromeStatus tracking link under see also.

design_system.rationale: Applies repository styles cleanly: places dark log blocks, clean grid cards, and outline buttons.

openQuestions.title: Sanitize innerHTML inputs in tree and list renderers
openQuestions.detail: Add an escapeHtml function to sanitize '&', '<', '>', '"', and '\''. Escape all child.target and child.data interpolations on line 244, and all pi.target and pi.data interpolations on line 271 to avert XSS vulnerabilities.
